name: style-skill-builder
description: Build reusable writing style skills from source material.

interface.longDescription: Style Skill Builder extracts writing style from samples, guides, comments, and interviews, then packages the result as a reusable writing skill with neutral style-guide scaffolding, evals, memory, and optional content-system modules.
defaultPrompt: Extract a writing style from these samples and turn it into a reusable skill.
Build a style guide skill with evals and memory from this source material.
Create a full content-system writing skill with optional operational modules.
